framework_info.framework_name: NIST SP 800-53 Security and Privacy Controls
framework_info.framework_description: NIST Special Publication 800-53 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for federal information systems and organizations to protect organizational operations and assets, individuals, other organizations, and the Nation from a diverse set of threats including hostile attacks, human errors, natural disasters, structural failures, foreign intelligence entities, and privacy risks.

policies.policy_title: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision Cryptoasset standard amendments
policies.policy_description: The Basel Committee on Banking Supervision published a consultative document proposing certain amendments to the prudential treatment of banks' exposures to cryptoassets.
policies.objective: To ensure that banks' exposures to cryptoassets are managed in a prudent manner

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Reserve assets must be placed in structures that are bankruptcy remote from any party that issues, manages or is involved in the stablecoin operation.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Reserve assets must be placed in structures that are bankruptcy remote from any party that issues, manages or is involved in the stablecoin operation.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Bankruptcy remoteness of cash' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision Cryptoasset standard amendments

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Inclusion of securities financing transactions (SFTs) in Group 1b stablecoin reserve assets
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Cash receivable under reverse repurchase agreements can be included in Group 1b stablecoin reserves, subject to certain minimum conditions.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Inclusion of securities financing transactions (SFTs) in Group 1b stablecoin reserve assets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Cash receivable under reverse repurchase agreements can be included in Group 1b stablecoin reserves, subject to certain minimum conditions.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Inclusion of securities financing transactions (SFTs) in Group 1b stablecoin reserve assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Inclusion of securities financing transactions (SFTs) in Group 1b stablecoin reserve assets
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision Cryptoasset standard amendments

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: External audit requirements for stablecoins reserve assets
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Stablecoins reserve assets must undergo external audits to ensure their quality and stability.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: External audit requirements for stablecoins reserve assets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Stablecoins reserve assets must undergo external audits to ensure their quality and stability.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'External audit requirements for stablecoins reserve assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: External audit requirements for stablecoins reserve assets
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision Cryptoasset standard amendments

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Clearing requirements for exchange-traded funds (ETFs)/exchange-traded notes (ETNs)
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: ETFs/ETNs must be cleared through a recognized clearinghouse to ensure their stability and liquidity.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: ETFs/ETNs must be cleared through a recognized clearinghouse to ensure their stability and liquidity.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Clearing requirements for ETFs/ETNs' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Clearing requirements for exchange-traded funds (ETFs)/exchange-traded notes (ETNs)
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision Cryptoasset standard amendments

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: ETFs/ETNs must disclose their cryptoasset exposures to ensure transparency and risk management.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Disclosure of cryptoasset exposures' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Clearing requirements for exchange-traded funds (ETFs)/exchange-traded notes (ETNs)
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision Cryptoasset standard amendments

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: National supervisors will determine the frequency of due diligence requirements for stablecoins.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Frequency of due diligence requirements for stablecoins
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: National supervisors will determine the frequency of due diligence requirements for stablecoins.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Frequency of due diligence requirements for stablecoins' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Basel Committee on Banking Supervision Cryptoasset standard amendments

policies.policy_description: The redemption risk test ensures that reserve assets are sufficient to enable the cryptoassets to be redeemable at all times for the peg value, including during periods of extreme stress.
policies.objective: To ensure that stablecoins can be redeemed in a timely and efficient manner

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Asset quality criteria for reserve assets
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Reserve assets must meet certain asset quality criteria to ensure their stability and liquidity.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Asset quality criteria for reserve assets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Reserve assets must meet certain asset quality criteria to ensure their stability and liquidity.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Asset quality criteria for reserve assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Asset quality criteria for reserve assets

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Exposures to SCO60 must be managed in accordance with the subpolicy.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'SCO60 Cryptoasset exposures' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Asset quality criteria for reserve assets

policies.policy_description: Cryptoassets with stabilisation mechanisms must satisfy certain requirements to be classified as stablecoins.
policies.objective: To ensure that stablecoins are managed in a prudent manner

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Stabilisation mechanism enables risk management similar to traditional assets
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The stabilisation mechanism must enable risk management similar to the risk management of traditional assets.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Stabilisation mechanism enables risk management similar to traditional assets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The stabilisation mechanism must enable risk management similar to the risk management of traditional assets.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Stabilisation mechanism enables risk management similar to traditional assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Stabilisation mechanism enables risk management similar to traditional assets

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Evidence of effectiveness of stabilisation mechanism
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Supervisors require evidence that the stabilisation mechanism is effective in managing risk.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Evidence of effectiveness of stabilisation mechanism
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Supervisors require evidence that the stabilisation mechanism is effective in managing risk.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Evidence of effectiveness of stabilisation mechanism' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Evidence of effectiveness of stabilisation mechanism

policies.policy_title: Asset Quality Criteria for Reserve Assets
policies.policy_description: For cryptoassets that are not pegged to currencies, the reserve assets must largely include asset(s) presenting the same risk profile of the reference assets.
policies.objective: To ensure the quality of reserve assets

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The governance arrangements relating to the management of reserve assets must be comprehensive and transparent.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The governance arrangements relating to the management of reserve assets must be comprehensive and transparent.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Governance Arrangements for Reserve Assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Asset Quality Criteria for Reserve Assets

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: An appropriate risk management framework exists to assess and monitor the risks of reserve assets.
subpolicies.control: Ongoing monitoring of deposit counterparties and custodians, daily valuation of reserve assets, and stress testing

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Ongoing monitoring of deposit counterparties and custodians
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The risk management framework must regularly monitor the creditworthiness of deposit counterparties and custodians to ensure they can meet their obligations.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Ongoing monitoring of deposit counterparties and custodians' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Asset Quality Criteria for Reserve Assets

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The risk management framework must daily value the reserve assets to ensure they are accurately reflected in the financial statements.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Daily valuation of reserve assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Asset Quality Criteria for Reserve Assets

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The risk management framework must conduct regular stress tests to ensure the reserve assets can withstand various economic scenarios.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Stress testing' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Asset Quality Criteria for Reserve Assets

policies.policy_description: The governance arrangements relating to the management of reserve assets must be comprehensive and transparent.
policies.objective: To ensure the effective management of reserve assets

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The reserve assets are managed and invested with an explicit legally enforceable objective of ensuring that all cryptoassets can be redeemed promptly at the peg value.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The reserve assets are managed and invested with an explicit legally enforceable objective of ensuring that all cryptoassets can be redeemed promptly at the peg value.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Legally Enforceable Objective' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Robust Operational Risk and Resilience Framework
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: A robust operational risk and resilience framework exists to ensure the availability and safe custody of the reserve assets.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Robust Operational Risk and Resilience Framework exists
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The subpolicy requires a robust operational risk and resilience framework to ensure the availability and safe custody of the reserve assets.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Robust Operational Risk and Resilience Framework exists' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Robust Operational Risk and Resilience Framework

policies.policy_description: The composition and value of the reserve assets are publicly disclosed on a regular basis.
policies.objective: To ensure transparency in reserve asset management

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The value and outstanding amount of cryptoassets in circulation must be disclosed at least daily.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The value and outstanding amount of cryptoassets in circulation must be disclosed at least daily by an independent third-party verification.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Daily Disclosure of Cryptoassets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The composition must be disclosed at least weekly.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The composition must be disclosed at least weekly.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Weekly Disclosure' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: The composition and value of the reserve assets are subject to an independent external audit at least annually.
policies.objective: To ensure the accuracy of reserve asset management

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The composition and value of the reserve assets are audited annually.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The composition and value of the reserve assets are audited annually.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Annual Audit' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: All rights, obligations and interests arising from the cryptoasset arrangement are clearly defined and legally enforceable in all jurisdictions where the asset is issued and redeemed.
policies.objective: To ensure clarity and legal enforceability of cryptoasset arrangements

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Settlement finality in both primary and secondary markets must be ensured.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: All settlement finality requirements for primary markets must be publicly disclosed and enforced.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Settlement Finality in Primary Markets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: All settlement finality requirements for secondary markets must be publicly disclosed and enforced.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Settlement Finality in Secondary Markets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Banks are required to conduct a legal review of the cryptoasset arrangement to ensure this condition is met.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Banks must conduct a legal review to ensure compliance with this condition.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Legal Review of Cryptoasset Arrangement' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Cryptoasset arrangements must be properly documented, including settlement finality and redemption mechanisms.
policies.objective: To ensure clarity and transparency in cryptoasset arrangements

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The documentation described must be publicly disclosed by the cryptoasset issuer.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The cryptoasset issuer must publicly disclose the documentation described in this subpolicy.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Public Disclosure' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: An independent legal opinion may be needed to confirm that the condition has been met if the offering of the cryptoasset to the public has not been approved by the relevant regulator.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: An independent legal opinion may be needed to confirm that the condition has been met if the offering of the cryptoasset to the public has not been approved by the relevant regulator.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Independent Legal Opinion' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Entities executing redemptions, transfers, storage or settlement finality of the cryptoasset must have in place and disclose a comprehensive governance framework.
policies.objective: To ensure effective governance of cryptoasset arrangements

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Entities must be regulated and supervised, or subject to appropriate risk management standards.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Entities must be regulated and supervised, or subject to appropriate risk management standards.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Regulatory Oversight' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The governance framework must be publicly disclosed.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The governance framework must be publicly disclosed.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Governance Framework Disclosure' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Banks must have arrangements in place to ensure compliance with the limit.
policies.objective: Prevent breaches of the Group 2 exposure limit threshold

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Banks must communicate immediately to the supervisor and rapidly rectify any breach.
subpolicies.control: Regularly review and update risk management policies

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Banks must communicate immediately to the supervisor and rapidly rectify any breach.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Breaching the Limit' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Use the formula set out in [SCO60.118] to calculate the RWA arising from Group 2 cryptoasset exposures.
subpolicies.control: Apply the formula correctly when calculating RWA

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Use the formula set out in [SCO60.118] to calculate the RWA arising from Group 2 cryptoasset exposures.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Calculating RWA' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Banks must provide qualitative information that sets out an overview of their activities related to cryptoassets and main risks.
policies.objective: Ensure transparency and accountability in cryptoasset-related activities

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Provide quantitative information on direct and indirect exposure amounts.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Provide accurate and detailed reports on direct and indirect exposure amounts.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Accurately report quantitative information' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Provide qualitative information on business activities, risk management policies, and main risks.
subpolicies.control: Ensure completeness and accuracy of qualitative information

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Provide qualitative information on business activities
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure that all business activities are documented and recorded accurately.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Provide qualitative information on business activities' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Ensure completeness and accuracy of qualitative information
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Verify that all qualitative information is complete, accurate, and up-to-date.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Ensure completeness and accuracy of qualitative information' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.

policies.policy_description: Banks must apply the comprehensive approach formula set out in the credit risk mitigation section of the standardised approach to credit risk.
policies.objective: Ensure accurate calculation of counterparty credit risk for Group 2 cryptoasset exposures

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Use the requirements specified in the SA-CCR framework to calculate Replacement Cost (RC) and Potential Future Exposure (PFE).
subpolicies.control: Apply the rules correctly when calculating RC and PFE

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Calculating Replacement Cost (RC) and Potential Future Exposure (PFE)
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Use the requirements specified in the SA-CCR framework to calculate RC and PFE
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Calculating Replacement Cost (RC) and Potential Future Exposure (PFE)' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Banks must classify cryptoassets into Group 1a, Group 1b, Group 2a, or Group 2b based on internationally accepted standards.
policies.objective: Ensure accurate classification of cryptoassets

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Conduct due diligence to ensure an adequate understanding of the stabilisation mechanism and effectiveness of Group 1b cryptoassets.
subpolicies.control: Perform regular due diligence on Group 1b cryptoassets

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Perform regular due diligence on Group 1b cryptoassets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Conduct thorough analysis of the stabilisation mechanism and effectiveness of Group 1b cryptoassets to ensure an adequate understanding.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Perform regular due diligence on Group 1b cryptoassets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Disclosure requirements for cryptoassets
policies.scope: Banks must include exposures to Group 1 cryptoassets in the relevant existing disclosure templates that apply to traditional assets
policies.objective: To ensure transparency and disclosure of cryptoasset risks

policies.policy_description: Description of the policy
policies.objective: July 2024
policies.policy_type: Framework: NIST SP 800-53 Security and Privacy Controls

policies.policy_description: Description of the policy
policies.objective: Objective of the policy

policies.policy_description: The final revised standard for the prudential treatment of banks' exposures to cryptoassets.
policies.objective: To ensure the prudential treatment of banks' exposures to cryptoassets is standardized.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The requirement for reserve assets to be placed in structures that are bankruptcy remote from any party involved in the stablecoin operation or custody of the reserve assets.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The requirement for reserve assets to be placed in structures that are bankruptcy remote from any party involved in the stablecoin operation or custody of the reserve assets.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Bankruptcy remoteness of cash' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Inclusion of securities financing transactions (SFTs) in Group 1b stablecoin reserve assets
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The permission for cash receivable under reverse repurchase agreements to be included in Group 1b stablecoin reserves, subject to certain minimum conditions.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Inclusion of securities financing transactions (SFTs) in Group 1b stablecoin reserve assets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The permission for cash receivable under reverse repurchase agreements to be included in Group 1b stablecoin reserves, subject to certain minimum conditions.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Inclusion of securities financing transactions (SFTs) in Group 1b stablecoin reserve assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Inclusion of securities financing transactions (SFTs) in Group 1b stablecoin reserve assets

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: External audit requirements for stablecoins reserve assets
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The clarification of external audit requirements for stablecoins' reserve assets.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: External audit requirements for stablecoins' reserve assets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The clarification of external audit requirements for stablecoins' reserve assets must be implemented to ensure transparency and accountability.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'External audit requirements for stablecoins' reserve assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: External audit requirements for stablecoins reserve assets

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Clearing requirements for exchange-traded funds (ETFs)/exchange-traded notes (ETNs)
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The clearing requirements for ETFs/ETNs.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The clearing requirement must be met by the firm before trading ETFs/ETNs.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Clearing requirements for ETFs/ETNs' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Clearing requirements for exchange-traded funds (ETFs)/exchange-traded notes (ETNs)

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The firm must ensure that all cryptoassets are properly cleared and reported in accordance with SCO60.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'SCO60 Cryptoasset exposures' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Clearing requirements for exchange-traded funds (ETFs)/exchange-traded notes (ETNs)

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The determination of the frequency of due diligence requirements by national supervisors.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The determination of the frequency of due diligence requirements by national supervisors.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Frequency of due diligence requirements' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Haircuts for ineligible collateral that are lent or posted under SFTs
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The application of haircuts to ineligible collateral that are lent or posted under SFTs.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Haircuts for ineligible collateral that are lent or posted under SFTs
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The application of haircuts to ineligible collateral that are lent or posted under SFTs must be in accordance with SCO60 Cryptoasset exposures.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Haircuts for ineligible collateral that are lent or posted under SFTs' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Haircuts for ineligible collateral that are lent or posted under SFTs

policies.scope: This policy applies to all organizational units, personnel, systems, and processes involved in cryptoasset standard amendments. The scope includes all business processes, documentation, reporting mechanisms, and personnel responsibilities related to regulatory compliance. It encompasses all organizational levels from executive leadership to operational staff, covering both direct and indirect compliance activities. The policy applies to all jurisdictions where the organization operates and all applicable regulatory requirements.
policies.objective: The primary objective of this policy is to establish clear requirements and guidelines for cryptoasset standard amendments, ensuring organizational compliance and operational effectiveness. Specific objectives include: (1) establishing clear expectations and requirements for organizational behavior; (2) ensuring consistent implementation of best practices across all applicable areas; (3) minimizing operational risks and compliance gaps; (4) promoting accountability and responsibility among all stakeholders; (5) enabling effective monitoring and continuous improvement; and (6) supporting overall organizational objectives and strategic goals.

subpolicies.control: The stabilisation mechanism enables risk management similar to the risk management of traditional assets, based on sufficient data or experience.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Stabilisation mechanism enables risk management similar to traditional assets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The stabilisation mechanism must be based on sufficient data or experience to enable risk management similar to the risk management of traditional assets.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Stabilisation mechanism enables risk management similar to traditional assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.control: Evidence must be provided to satisfy supervisors of the effectiveness of the stabilisation mechanism, including the composition, valuation and frequency of valuation of the reserve asset(s) and the quality of available data.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Control: Evidence must be provided to satisfy supervisors of the effectiveness of the stabilisation mechanism, including the composition, valuation and frequency of valuation of the reserve asset(s) and the quality of available data.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Documentation and evidence requirements' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.scope: This policy applies to all organizational units, personnel, systems, and processes involved in redemption risk test. The scope includes all organizational assets, business processes, and operational activities that may be subject to risk. It covers all risk categories including operational, financial, strategic, and reputational risks. The policy applies to all organizational levels and includes both internal operations and external partnerships or vendor relationships.
policies.objective: The primary objective of this policy is to establish clear requirements and guidelines for redemption risk test, ensuring organizational compliance and operational effectiveness. Specific objectives include: (1) establishing clear expectations and requirements for organizational behavior; (2) ensuring consistent implementation of best practices across all applicable areas; (3) minimizing operational risks and compliance gaps; (4) promoting accountability and responsibility among all stakeholders; (5) enabling effective monitoring and continuous improvement; and (6) supporting overall organizational objectives and strategic goals.

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Asset quality criteria for reserve assets
subpolicies.control: The reserve assets must be comprised of assets with minimal market and credit risk where: (i) the reserve assets should consist mainly of assets with short-term maturities [5] and high credit quality[6]; and (ii) the reserve assets have a proven record of relative stability of market terms (eg low volatility of traded prices and spreads) even during stressed market conditions.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Asset quality criteria for reserve assets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The reserve assets must be comprised of assets with minimal market and credit risk where the reserve assets should consist mainly of assets with short-term maturities and high credit quality, and the reserve assets have a proven record of relative stability of market terms even during stressed market conditions.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Asset quality criteria for reserve assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Asset quality criteria for reserve assets

policies.policy_description: Each reserve asset has a proven record as a reliable source of liquidity in the markets, and those that are marketable securities are traded in large, deep and active markets.
policies.objective: Ensure reliable source of liquidity for reserve assets

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The pricing formula must be easy to calculate and not depend on strong assumptions, and the inputs into the pricing formula must be publicly available.
subpolicies.control: Use a transparent and easily calculable pricing formula

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The pricing formula must be easy to calculate and not depend on strong assumptions, and the inputs into the pricing formula must be publicly available.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Pricing Formula Requirements' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The reserve assets provide sufficient daily liquidity to meet “instant” redemption requests from the cryptoasset holders.
subpolicies.control: Ensure adequate daily liquidity for instant redemptions

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The reserve assets provide sufficient daily liquidity to meet “instant” redemption requests from the cryptoasset holders.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Daily Liquidity Requirements' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Central bank reserves, marketable securities representing claims on or guaranteed by sovereigns and central banks with high credit quality, and deposits at banks with high credit quality and safeguards.
policies.objective: Ensure eligible reserve assets for stablecoin operations

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Central bank reserves can be held if the stablecoin issuer is eligible and the central bank's policies allow it.
subpolicies.control: Obtain necessary approvals from central banks

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Obtain necessary approvals from central banks
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The stablecoin issuer must obtain the approval of the relevant central bank before holding central bank reserves.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Obtain necessary approvals from central banks' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Marketable securities representing claims on or guaranteed by sovereigns and central banks with high credit quality can be used as reserve assets.
subpolicies.control: Verify high credit quality of sovereigns and central banks

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Verify high credit quality of sovereigns and central banks
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure that the sovereigns and central banks have a high credit rating from reputable agencies such as Moody's, Standard & Poor's, or Fitch.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Verify high credit quality of sovereigns and central banks' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: Reserve assets must be denominated in the same currency or currencies as the peg value, with a de minimis portion allowed for other currencies.
policies.objective: Ensure reserve asset denomination matches peg value

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Currency mismatch risk between reserve assets and peg value must be appropriately hedged.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Properly hedge the currency mismatch risk between reserve assets and peg value.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Implement currency mismatch risk management' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_title: Asset Quality Criteria for Non-Pegged Cryptoassets
policies.policy_description: Reserve assets for non-pegged cryptoassets should largely include reference assets, except for a de minimis portion of cash or bank deposits.
policies.objective: Ensure asset quality criteria for non-pegged cryptoassets

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Reserve assets should include only reference assets, except for a de minimis portion of cash or bank deposits.
subpolicies.control: Use reference assets as primary reserve assets

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Use of Reference Assets as Primary Reserve Assets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Reserve assets should include only reference assets, except for a de minimis portion of cash or bank deposits.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Use of Reference Assets as Primary Reserve Assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.PolicyTitle: Asset Quality Criteria for Non-Pegged Cryptoassets

policies.policy_description: Governance arrangements relating to the management of reserve assets must be comprehensive and transparent, ensuring explicit legally enforceable objectives and robust operational risk and resilience frameworks.
policies.objective: Ensure effective management of reserve assets

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Reserve assets must be managed with explicit legally enforceable objectives.

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Establish clear and enforceable objectives for reserve assets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: All reserve assets must have explicit legally enforceable objectives that are clearly defined, measurable, achievable, relevant, and time-bound (SMART). These objectives should be regularly reviewed and updated to ensure they remain relevant and effective.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Establish clear and enforceable objectives for reserve assets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_title: Robust Operational Risk and Resilience Frameworks
subpolicies.subpolicy_description: A robust operational risk and resilience framework must exist to ensure the availability and safe custody of reserve assets.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: A robust operational risk and resilience framework must exist to ensure the availability and safe custody of reserve assets.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Implement robust operational risk management' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.
compliance_records.SubPolicyName: Robust Operational Risk and Resilience Frameworks

policies.policy_description: A mandate that describes the types of assets that may be included in the reserve must be publicly disclosed and kept up to date.
policies.objective: To ensure transparency and accountability in reserve asset management

policies.policy_title: Risk Management Framework for Reserve Assets
policies.policy_description: An appropriate risk management framework exists to assess and monitor the risks of reserve assets, including but not limited to market risk, credit risk, concentration risk and liquidity risk.
policies.objective: To identify and mitigate potential risks associated with reserve assets

policies.policy_title: Public Disclosure of Reserve Asset Composition and Value
policies.policy_description: The composition and value of the reserve assets are publicly disclosed on a regular basis.
policies.objective: To ensure transparency and accountability in reserve asset management

policies.policy_title: Independent Verification of Reserve Asset Disclosure
policies.policy_description: The value and outstanding amount of cryptoassets in circulation must be disclosed at least daily, once every trade day, and the composition must be disclosed at least weekly.
policies.objective: To ensure accuracy and completeness of reserve asset disclosure

policies.policy_title: Independent External Audit of Reserve Assets
policies.policy_description: The composition and value of the reserve assets are subject to an independent external audit at least annually to confirm they match the disclosed reserves and are consistent with the mandate.
policies.objective: To ensure accuracy and consistency of reserve asset management

policies.policy_title: Maximum Maturity Limit for Reserve Assets
policies.policy_description: Supervisors may specify a maximum maturity limit for individual reserve assets and/or a portfolio weighted average maturity limit for a pool of reserve assets.
policies.objective: To mitigate potential risks associated with long-term reserve assets

policies.policy_description: The following are excluded from the calculation of eligible reserve assets: cash received from repurchase agreements and similar securities financing transactions, and securities received from collateral swaps.
policies.objective: To ensure that only high-quality reserve assets are used

policies.policy_description: All rights, obligations and interests arising from the cryptoasset arrangement are clearly defined and legally enforceable in all the jurisdictions where the asset is issued and redeemed.
policies.objective: Ensure legal enforceability of cryptoasset arrangements

policies.policy_description: At all times, settlement finality in cryptoasset arrangements must be properly documented such that it is clear when the cryptoasset has become irrevocably and unconditionally transferred.
policies.objective: Ensure proper documentation of settlement finality

policies.policy_description: All entities that execute redemptions, transfers, storage or settlement finality of the cryptoasset, or manage or invest reserve assets, must be regulated and supervised, or subject to appropriate risk management standards.
policies.scope: Entities executing redemptions, transfers, storage or settlement finality of the cryptoasset
policies.objective: Ensure regulatory compliance

policies.policy_description: All entities that execute redemptions, transfers, storage or settlement finality of the cryptoasset, or manage or invest reserve assets, must have in place and disclose a comprehensive governance framework.
policies.scope: Entities executing redemptions, transfers, storage or settlement finality of the cryptoasset
policies.objective: Ensure governance framework

policies.policy_description: Banks must have in place the appropriate risk management policies, procedures, governance, human and IT capacities to evaluate the risks of engaging in cryptoassets.
policies.objective: Ensure risk management policies

policies.policy_description: Banks must assess whether the cryptoassets to which they are exposed are compliant with the classification conditions set out in [SCO60.6] to [SCO60.19] and the hedging recognition criteria set out in [SCO60.55].
policies.objective: Ensure compliance assessments

policies.policy_description: For cryptoassets that are classified as Group 1b, a bank must perform due diligence to ensure that they have an adequate understanding, at acquisition and thereafter on a regular basis, of the stabilisation mechanism of the cryptoasset.
policies.objective: Ensure due diligence

policies.policy_description: For cryptoassets that are classified as Group 1b, a bank must conduct statistical or other tests demonstrating that the cryptoasset maintains a stable relationship in comparison to its reference asset.
policies.objective: Ensure basis risk test

policies.policy_description: The bank's cryptoasset exposure is limited to one of the following: a direct holding of a spot Group 2 cryptoasset, a derivative or ETF/ETN that references a Group 2 cryptoasset, etc.
policies.objective: To limit the bank's exposure to Group 2 cryptoassets

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Breaches of the Group 2 exposure limit threshold of 1% should not generally occur and banks must have arrangements in place to ensure compliance with the limit.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: Breaches of the Group 2 exposure limit threshold of 1% should not generally occur and banks must have arrangements in place to ensure compliance with the limit.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Group 2 Exposure Limit Threshold' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: For SFTs, banks must apply the comprehensive approach formula set out in the credit risk mitigation section of the standardised approach to credit risk.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: For SFTs, banks must apply the comprehensive approach formula set out in the credit risk mitigation section of the standardised approach to credit risk.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Group 2 Cryptoasset Exposure Calculation' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_description: For derivative exposures that have Group 2b cryptoassets as the underlying or that are priced in units of a Group 2b cryptoasset, the exposure will be calculated using the Replacement Cost (RC) plus the Potential Future Exposure (PFE).
policies.objective: To calculate counterparty credit risk for derivative exposures with Group 2b cryptoassets

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: The RC must be calculated using the requirements specified in the SA-CCR framework.

compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: The RC must be calculated using the requirements specified in the SA-CCR framework.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Replacement Cost Calculation' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: For Group 2b cryptoassets, the PFE is to be calculated as 50% of the gross notional amount.
subpolicies.control: Calculate PFE with 50% of gross notional amount

compliance_records.ComplianceTitle: Potential Future Exposure Calculation for Group 2b Cryptoassets
compliance_records.ComplianceItemDescription: For Group 2b cryptoassets, the PFE is to be calculated as 50% of the gross notional amount.
compliance_records.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Potential Future Exposure Calculation for Group 2b Cryptoassets' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

policies.policy_title: Capital Requirements for Group 2b Cryptoasset Exposures
policies.policy_description: Regulates capital requirements for banks' exposures to Group 2b cryptoassets.
policies.objective: To ensure that banks have sufficient capital to cover their risks related to Group 2b cryptoasset exposures.

policies.policy_title: Disclosure Requirements for Banks' Cryptoasset Exposures
policies.policy_description: Requires banks to disclose certain information about their cryptoasset exposures.
policies.objective: To provide transparency and accountability regarding banks' cryptoasset exposures.

policies.policy_description: Banks must disclose information regarding any material cryptoasset exposures on a regular basis.
policies.scope: All Group 1a, Group 1b, Group 2a and Group 2b cryptoassets
policies.objective: To ensure transparency and accountability in cryptoasset exposures

policies.policy_title: Inclusion of Cryptoasset Exposures in Disclosure Templates
policies.policy_description: Banks must include exposures to Group 1 cryptoassets in the relevant existing disclosure templates that apply to traditional assets.
policies.scope: All Group 1a, Group 1b, Group 2a and Group 2b cryptoassets
policies.objective: To ensure consistency and completeness of cryptoasset exposures in disclosures
